name: can someone explain warcraft logs percentile to me like I
snippet:
100% - You did the best dps out of any recorded player for your spec on that fight and difficulty. 0% - You did the worst. 50% - You did average.
Percentiles work like this more or less (not 100% accurate, but close enough for what you want): 100% - You did the best dps out of any recorded player for your spec on that fight and difficulty. 0% - You did the worst. 50% - You did average. It's always compared to your spec.

name: API: Getting historical percentiles - Warcraft Logs
snippet: Sep 27, 2018 — Greetings, Some time ago, the /parses endpoint was returning the best_historical_percent key. That is no longer the case.

name: wow-analysis/warcraft_logs_fn.py at master
snippet: Queries Warcraft Logs api for players' rankings for hps, dps and tankhps. Saves json file of query data. args:.

name: The Complete Guide To Rankings And Parses

name: WCLToolTipTBCAnniversary - World of Warcraft Addons
